question: s6-q013

evidence.A: obs.apply_layout(isa.layout) -> run SUCCEEDS, evs=0.889 (buggy run had failed with ValueError: The number of qubits of the circuit (5) does not match the number of qubits of the ()-th observable (2).)
evidence.B: adding measure_all() does NOT fix it: still ValueError (the 2-qubit observable still does not span the 5-qubit ISA circuit)
evidence.C: run(..., backend=) raises TypeError: run() has no backend kwarg, and it would not align the observable anyway
evidence.D: the string 'ZZ' is still a 2-qubit observable, so it still raises ValueError: switching type does not fix the width

observed.buggy_error: ValueError: The number of qubits of the circuit (5) does not match the number of qubits of the ()-th observable (2).
